title: pteris pedata var. collina
intro: Pteris pedata var. collina, also known as the Collina Brake Fern, is a variety of the Pteris pedata species, a type of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The Collina Brake Fern is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and extracts, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
